infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CoverMe needs your location to update your trusted circle and emergency services during an active journey or SOS trigger.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CoverMe requires background location access to keep your trusted contacts informed of your safety during your journey even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CoverMe needs camera access to capture your vehicle's license plate for verification.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CoverMe needs microphone access for hands-free voice-activated SOS triggers.
